{{Infobox concept
| name = Silver Light
| introduced = City of Light
}}

''See also: [[Silver Light Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver]] [[Light]] is a mental power or artifact that functions by enhancing the user's intellect and perception. While [[Elysian]] lore describes it as a gift of wisdom for those with great insight, the user [[Alin]] experiences it more as an inescapable internal voice that often conveys feelings of guilt or accusation. Visually, the power manifests to [[Alin]] as shimmering metallic dust that can make human bodies appear translucent, allowing him to see internal structures like bones, nerves, and marrow. He can also direct the light in broad sweeps to scan environments for specific sensations like pain or panic, though this method is less precise than focused observation. The ability appears to be a [[Silver]]-class artifact that, when paired with [[Red Light]], serves to augment the mind. Beyond its sensory capabilities, the [[Silver]] [[Light]] possesses a sentient quality, communicating with [[Alin]] through whispers and internal observations.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|In [[Elysian]] legend and tradition, the [[Silver]] [[Light]] is a power of wisdom that allows a user to see through skin and into the marrow of a human body. [[Alin]] possesses this power, which he can call upon to search the city or command to spread throughout its streets. While it can function as a screen or provide protection through a bond, the [[Silver]] [[Light]] is also a whispering voice that radiates sadness. During his journey, the entity warns [[Alin]] of people scrambling from the [[Naraka Gate]] and alerts him to something below. Finally, the [[Silver]] [[Light]] points out that the death of [[Zakareth]] does not signify that things were good.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] is a power of wisdom in [[Elysian]] legend and tradition.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] allows a user to see through skin and into the marrow of a human body.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] said nothing.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Silver Light]] is a power [[Alin]] possesses that he can cast to see inside.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can command [[Silver Light]] to spread through the city.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can use [[Silver Light]] as a screen.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] whispers to [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Silver Light]] can provide protection through a bond.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can use [[Silver Light]] to search the city.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] is a voice that radiates sadness.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] warned [[Alin]] that people were scrambling out of the [[Naraka Gate]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] alerted [[Alin]] to something below.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can call [[Silver Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] has [[Silver Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Silver Light]] points out that killing [[Zakareth]] does not mean things were good.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"Silver Light spun at his command, flashing into every window, through every cracked door."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
